evals.prompt: I just ran install.sh on my Mac, can you check that everything installed correctly? I think some skills might not have synced properly.
evals.expected_output: Claude runs the verify.sh script, shows the categorized terminal output, and reports whether all skills, settings, CLI binary, and 1Password injections are in order. If anything failed, it offers to run --fix.
Claude recognizes this as a trigger for verify-install skill, runs the verification script, and presents results. Even this minimal prompt should trigger the skill.

evals.prompt: Something feels off after I pulled new changes to ~/Sites/claude and re-ran install.sh. My telegram bot stopped working and I'm not sure if the 1Password stuff injected properly. Can you check everything?
evals.expected_output: Claude runs verify.sh, pays special attention to the 1Password injection section and Telegram-related checks, and highlights any failures there. If Telegram Bot Token is missing or op isn't authenticated, it explains the fix.
